faqTeaser.description: Quickly review common questions about prep and aftercare.

0.q: What should I share for a quick quote?
0.a: A reference image, rough size, and target area are enough to shape an initial plan.

1.q: Can this design finish in one session?
1.a: Session count depends on detail density and placement; we confirm after reviewing the design.

2.q: How should I prepare before the appointment?
2.a: Arriving rested, hydrated, and having eaten helps the session stay comfortable.

3.q: What should I avoid in the first days?
3.a: Friction, dirty contact, and over-touching the area can slow healing.

4.q: How do I protect the tattoo from sun?
4.a: During early healing, limit direct sun and keep the area protected.

5.q: When can I safely return to workouts?
5.a: Reintroduce high-sweat and high-friction training gradually.

6.q: For an old tattoo, cover-up or lightening first?
6.a: We choose the path based on darkness, shape, and your final design goal.

7.q: Can touch-up needs be anticipated early?
7.a: Small touch-ups can be planned in advance based on skin response and placement.

dil.heading: Tongue Piercing
dil.shortDescription: Tongue Piercing options with minimal barbells or brighter details.
dil.longDescription: We focus on comfort and visual balance while selecting jewelry that fits your style and daily use.

gobek.heading: Navel Piercing
gobek.shortDescription: Navel Piercing styles from clean minimal looks to jeweled details.
gobek.longDescription: We choose jewelry type, length, and visual density together to deliver a neat and aesthetic navel result.

septum.heading: Septum Piercing
septum.shortDescription: Septum Piercing looks with ring and clicker options.

industrial.heading: Industrial Piercing
industrial.shortDescription: Industrial Piercing with a strong single-bar line effect on the ear.

teaser.description: Access frequently asked questions about the Tattoo and Piercing process from a single page.

ui.noResultsHint: Change your search term or try the category filter as "All".

guide-contact.label: Contact page
guide-contact.description: Address, hours, and quick contact options.

tattoo-fiyat.aShort: The biggest factor is labor time; size is not the only criterion.
tattoo-fiyat.aLong: The biggest factor is labor time. Size matters but it is not the only criterion: detail density (fine work takes longer), style (fine line, realism, traditional, etc.), body area (harder placement), and original custom drawing. For a clear quote, a reference image + size (cm) + target area is enough.

tattoo-sure-seans.q: How many hours does a Tattoo take, and how many sessions?
tattoo-sure-seans.aShort: Time and sessions depend on detail and placement. Send the image and I can make a clear plan.
tattoo-sure-seans.aLong: Even two tattoos in the same size can take different time. Minimal work is shorter, while realistic/heavy shading takes longer and may require multiple sessions. It is hard to give an exact answer without seeing the design, but if you send the image, I can map time + session plan.

tattoo-once-hazirlik.q: How should I prepare before getting a Tattoo?
tattoo-once-hazirlik.aShort: It is best to come rested, fed, and hydrated. Wear comfortable clothes.
tattoo-once-hazirlik.aLong: It is best to come to the session rested, fed, and hydrated. Choose comfortable clothing so the Tattoo area is easy to access. If you do not feel well, postponing is the better option.

tattoo-alkol.q: Can I get a Tattoo after drinking alcohol?
tattoo-alkol.aShort: Alcohol can affect the body and may make application and healing harder. Safest is to avoid alcohol before the session.
tattoo-alkol.aLong: Alcohol can affect the body, which may make both application and healing harder. The safest option is to avoid alcohol before the session.

tattoo-hamile-emzirme.q: Can I get a Tattoo during pregnancy / breastfeeding?
tattoo-hamile-emzirme.aShort: It is a sensitive topic; most people prefer to postpone. The healthiest choice is to follow medical advice.
tattoo-hamile-emzirme.aLong: This is a sensitive topic. Most people prefer to postpone Tattoo during this period. The healthiest approach is to follow your doctor's advice.

tattoo-bakim-48saat.q: What should I do in the first 24-48 hours after a Tattoo?
tattoo-bakim-48saat.aShort: The first two days are critical: keep it clean, avoid irritation, do not overuse products.
tattoo-bakim-48saat.aLong: The first two days are critical: keep it clean + avoid irritation + do not overuse products. After the session, we explain your aftercare steps clearly. Most important rule: no touching, no rubbing, no dirty contact.

tattoo-kabuk-soyulma.q: Will a Tattoo scab or peel? Is it normal?
tattoo-kabuk-soyulma.aShort: Scabbing/peeling/itching is normal for most tattoos. Do not pick the scabs.
tattoo-kabuk-soyulma.aLong: Yes, scabbing/peeling/itching is normal for most tattoos. The biggest mistake is picking the scabs. This can cause scarring and color loss.

tattoo-iyilesme.q: How long does a Tattoo take to heal?
tattoo-iyilesme.aShort: Recovery time depends on the person and area; full skin settling can take longer.
tattoo-iyilesme.aLong: The first visible recovery usually starts quickly, but full skin settling can take longer. Healing depends on area, aftercare, and skin type. After your session, we tell you what to expect day by day.

tattoo-dus.q: Can I shower after a Tattoo?
tattoo-dus.aShort: Usually yes, but no very hot water, long steam, or hard scrubbing.
tattoo-dus.aLong: Usually yes, but avoid very hot water, long steam, and hard scrubbing. A clean and gentle routine is best.

tattoo-deniz-havuz-sauna.q: When can I go to sea / pool / sauna?
tattoo-deniz-havuz-sauna.aShort: During healing, long water exposure and sauna/steam can stress the skin; waiting until recovery is safer.
tattoo-deniz-havuz-sauna.aLong: While Tattoo is healing, long water exposure and sauna/steam can stress the skin. The safest option is to wait until recovery. Based on your area and work, we give a clear time range.

tattoo-spor.aShort: In the first days, heavy sweat, friction, and stretching may irritate it; then return gradually.
tattoo-spor.aLong: In the first days, heavy sweat, friction, and stretching can irritate the Tattoo. Then you can return gradually. Tattoo location (arm, leg, ribs, etc.) is the key factor here.

tattoo-gunes.q: Does a Tattoo fade in the sun? How to protect it?
tattoo-gunes.aShort: Sun is the biggest enemy of a Tattoo; protect it especially during healing.
tattoo-gunes.aLong: Sun is the biggest enemy of Tattoo. It must be protected especially during healing. After that, sun protection helps your Tattoo stay vivid for years.

tattoo-rotus.aShort: Small touch-ups are normal in some areas or skin types.
tattoo-rotus.aLong: Small touch-ups may be needed in some areas or skin types. This is completely normal. The touch-up need depends on area, aftercare, and skin type.

tattoo-coverup.q: Do you do cover-up? Can you cover an old Tattoo?
tattoo-coverup.aShort: Most tattoos can be improved with cover-up; darkness of the old Tattoo limits design options. We can confirm with photo.
tattoo-coverup.aLong: Most tattoos can be improved with cover-up, but the darkness and shape of the old Tattoo limits design options. We do not say "definitely yes" without seeing a photo. Send a photo and we will clearly tell what works and the best plan.

tattoo-lazer-vs-coverup.q: Tattoo removal (laser) or cover-up: which is better?
tattoo-lazer-vs-coverup.aShort: Some are suitable for direct cover-up; some get better results with laser lightening first and then cover-up.
tattoo-lazer-vs-coverup.aLong: Some tattoos are suitable for direct cover-up; some get better results after slight laser lightening and then cover-up. Sometimes the goal is not "fully remove" but "make it coverable". We choose the best path with your photo.

piercing-igne-tabanca-sterilizasyon.q: Where should I get Piercing done? Needle or gun, and is there sterilization (autoclave)?

piercing-ilk-taki-materyali.q: What should the first jewelry material be? What is the difference between titanium/steel/gold?

piercing-iyilesme-suresi.q: How long does each Piercing take to heal?

piercing-bakim-24-48.q: How is aftercare in the first 24-48 hours after Piercing? What should I clean with?

piercing-taki-degisim-downsizing.q: When can I change Piercing jewelry? When is downsizing done?

piercing-kulaklik-kask-baski.q: What happens if I sleep on it / if headphones-helmet put pressure on it?
